name: Aerial Missile Fire and Critical Hits
description: Air-to-air is normal missile fire plus the hit-location and critical tables. Air-to-ground bars ordinary catapult fire: sling-ended catapults shotgun small stones, apex at half range, height equal to full range (counterpoised) or half; tension catapults dart straight up to full range with no minimum; use a spherical hit area. On a hit, location by attack aspect (d10, 0 = 10): rider, head, wing, body, tail; riderless hits become body hits. Critical chances by location (rider 25% — including all NPCs under 3rd level — head/wing 20%, body 10%, tail nil) force speed halved, dive-and-land, withdrawal, or death in the air per the matrix; a crash costs the rider one die per 1" of height.

data.note: critical matrix: Rider 25%→withdraw 100%; Head 20%→10/30/40/20; Wing 20%→50/20/30/—; Body 10%→30/30/30/10; Tail nil
